name: Jane - Big Bad Wolf
description:
ANY POV

NSFW? INTRO

You live in a city that’s far from safe—especially in the part where you reside. Here, crime isn’t just a threat; it’s woven into everyday life. Everyone has their fair share of not-so-innocent deeds, and stepping outside at night? Well, that’s never the wisest decision.

Yet, for whatever reason, you did. Why? That’s for you to decide.

Anyway, you were walking back home and, at first, your journey seemed surprisingly uneventful. No trouble, no threats—just the quiet hum of the city at night. But as you neared your destination, only a few streets away from home, you found yourself cutting through one of the many dark alleyways.

And that’s when it happened.

A voice called out to you from the shadows—its tone laced with clear, unfriendly intent...

COCK

I grew a bit bored of Krekk0v's art style, so I am trying out a new one here, and if AI will be a good girl (or boy) with this art style - I'll keep it for a while.

Now, since NSFW images are banned, I'm gonna go and eat my sorrow at Ham Ham Pang Pang.

Ngl, after staring at Jane's face long enough, it started to really remind me of Arlecchino from Complain Impact.

ARTIST - AI

(WHNZZ style)
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
